The '''''Invincible''''' was a [[Republic light assault cruiser]], the [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]] of [[Ranulph Tarkin/Legends|Ranulph Tarkin]] and the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Outland Regions Security Force/Legends|his fleet]].<ref name="SOTG07" /> Besides Tarkin, its crew included [[Antidar Williams/Legends|Antidar Williams]]<ref name="AWDB" /> and [[Jace Dallin]].<ref name="SWR:TSHW" />

==History==
[[File:TarkinsInvincible.jpg|thumb|left|150px|The ''Invincible'' breaks up over [[Troiken/Legends|Troiken]].]]
The ''Invincible'', along with several other [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class space cruisers]], underwent an extensive refit for several months in a major shipyard in order to become light assault cruisers. In addition to added weapons, sensors, and armor, the ship was fitted with ten slots for [[Evac pod]]s on its ventral side to carry troops to the battlefield. In order to carry this additional equipment, the ship's engines were replaced with larger ones similar to those of a [[CSS-1 Corellian Star Shuttle/Legends|Corellian Star Shuttle]].<ref name="SOTG07" />

During the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]], the ''Invincible'' was part of the third of the fleet that survived the [[navcomputer virus]] of the [[Stark Commercial Combine]] and arrived at [[Troiken/Legends|Troiken]]. There, with the rest of Tarkin's ships, it was destroyed in the [[First Battle of Qotile]].<ref name="SWR:TSHW" />

The ship was filled up with troops, and Tarkin decided to use a small [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] during its evacuation, since the Stark Combine fleet would more likely target the [[Evac pod|larger ones]] used by his soldiers.<ref name="SWR:TSHW" />
